# Your New Business

> URL: https://fertile-grace.onrender.com

> Create a premium feminine wellness website/app for a Christian, pro-life period and fertility tracking platform rooted in holistic and functional medicine. Use a soft apricot background with cream, buttery yellow, and light blue accents (optional sage botanical touches). Aesthetic should feel elegant, calming, modern, organic, and high-end with rounded layouts, soft textures, botanical illustrations, serif + clean sans typography, and luxury wellness branding.

## About

Your New Business is an AI-powered business. This file provides a brief overview for
language model crawlers and AI assistants.

## Pages

- /: Home — learn about Your New Business and get started
- /blog: Blog — articles, updates, and insights
- /blog/[slug]: Individual blog posts

## Contact

For inquiries, please visit our website.
